concept.title: L3 Features Overview
concept.shortdesc: Read this topic to learn about the features available in the Juniper Cloud-Native Router when deployed in L3 (router) mode.

conbody.p: The Juniper Cloud-Native Router supports multiple deployment modes.

In L3 mode, the cloud-native router behaves like a router and so performs routing functions and runs routing protocols such as ISIS, BGP, OSPF, and segment routing-MPLS. In L3 mode, the pod network is divided into an IPv6 underlay network and an IPv4 or IPv6 overlay network. The IPv6 underlay network is used for control plane traffic. All L3 features are supported with DPDK datapath. Please review to verify feature support for eBPF XDP datapath.
This chapter provides information about the various L3 features supported by JCNR.
